resources.name: Food handout

resources.name: GoodWill Opportunity Center
resources.description: Helps people needing housing support or those who are reentering the workforce, and people facing barriers in employment.
resources.informationText:
**What is offered:**
* free career fairs
* digital literacy classes
* youth employment programs
* wellness and life-skills classes
* a mobile app with online resources and access to career specialists.
**Eligibility:**
Homeless persons or near homeless veterans
Additional text:
**Main services:**
* Job placement assistance
* Job skills training
* Veteran’s services
* Community social services (partner organizations that can help with healthcare, housing, mental health and other needs).

resources.name: Supportive Housing Coalition of New Mexico
resources.description:
Provides: Permanent supportive housing coordination, housing advocacy, and system‑level collaboration
Note: Does not provide direct shelter intake.
resources.informationText:
Additional text:
**Amity Foundation** – Social services, reentry, and rehabilitation programs
**A Better Way of Living, Inc.** – Transitional and supportive housing
* Resources: [greatnonprofits.org], [nonprofitlocator.org]
* Phone: (505)-332-9164
* Hours: Mon-Fri. From 9AM-4:30PM
* Address: 2823 Richmond Drive NE
* Albuquerque, NM 87107
* Website: https://abetterwaynm.org/contact/
* Information: Supports people with developmental disabilities to help them realize their potential in different areas of life such as  work, education, leisure, and relationships.
**Amistad** - 1706 Centro Familiar SW 505-877-0371
* Teen shelter for ages 12-17 yrs old 24-hour shelter
**Family Promise** - 505-268-0331
* Shelter for families with minor children
**Haven House** - 505-896-4869
* Shelter for victims of domestic violence and their children (Rio Rancho) - Domestic Violence
**Noon day Ministry** - 2400 Second NW 505-246-8001
* Day shelter Tues - Fri. 9 a.m. - 1 p.m., Sunday 11 a.m. - 1 p.m.
**Valencia Shelter** - 505-565-3100
* Shelter for women and children (Belen) Domestic violence
